header: How Northwind Group runs five brands on one TYPO3 install

client_logo.title: Northwind Group logo
client_logo.description: Fictional demo brand from the Desiderio styleguide.

description:
Northwind's agency consolidated five brand sites into a single TYPO3 14 install. Each subtree carries its own Desiderio theme preset — Marine for logistics, Gold for the holding, Bloom for the careers portal — inherited down the rootline through one page property. The creators handled installation & setup (€890) and reviewed the custom presets through the Agency plan; the whole relaunch shipped in six weeks.
One component library, five visual identities, zero rebuilds when a brand changes its look.

image.title: Desiderio per-page theme preset field
image.alternative: TYPO3 page properties showing the Desiderio theme preset selector for a page subtree.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
